combined_text: How Long Does it Take a Peach Tree to Grow? Home »Trees How Long Does it Take a Peach Tree to Grow? By Jenn Mercer; Updated September 21, 2017Peach trees grow from 1 to 1 1/2 feet each year and will take from two to four years to begin to bear fruit.
